---
id: platform-search
title: "Search"
description: "Execute a search query and retrieve ranked results. This is the data retrieval variant of the search API and returns only results and pagination state."
sidebar_label: "Search"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/platform-api/glean-platform-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  children={"Search"}

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/search"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>

:::experimental

Expect changes and instability. Introduced on April 8, 2026. [Learn how experimental APIs work](/experimental/overview).

:::

Execute a search query and retrieve ranked results. This is the data retrieval variant of the search API and returns only results and pagination state.

  as={"h2"}
